inputs.label: Observer Height
inputs.businessContext: Height of the observer above the ground level in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Height of the observer above the ground level in meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gözlemcinin yer seviyesinden metre cinsinden yüksekliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Höhe des Beobachters über dem Boden in Metern.

inputs.label: Target Height
inputs.businessContext: Height of the target object above the ground level in meters. Set to 0 for horizon distance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Height of the target object above the ground level in meters. Set to 0 for horizon distance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hedef nesnenin yer seviyesinden yüksekliği (metre). Ufuk mesafesi için 0 olarak ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Höhe des Zielobjekts über dem Boden in Metern. Auf 0 setzen für Horizontentfernung.

inputs.label: Earth Radius
inputs.businessContext: Mean radius of the Earth in kilometers. Standard value is 6371 km.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mean radius of the Earth in kilometers. Standard value is 6371 km.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dünya'nın ortalama yarıçapı (kilometre). Standart değer 6371 km'dir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Mittlerer Erdradius in Kilometern. Standardwert ist 6371 km.

inputs.label: Refraction Coefficient
inputs.businessContext: Atmospheric refraction coefficient. For standard atmosphere, k=0.13. Range typically 0 to 0.2.

businessContext_i18n.en: Atmospheric refraction coefficient. For standard atmosphere, k=0.13. Range typically 0 to 0.2.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Atmosferik kırılma katsayısı. Standart atmosfer için k=0,13. Aralık genellikle 0 ile 0,2 arasındadır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Atmosphärischer Refraktionskoeffizient. Für Standardatmosphäre k=0,13. Bereich typischerweise 0 bis 0,2.

breakdown.label: Effective Earth Radius
breakdown.description: Effective Earth radius after correcting for atmospheric refraction.

breakdown.label: Observer Horizon Distance
breakdown.description: Distance to the visible horizon from the observer's height.

breakdown.label: Target Horizon Distance
breakdown.description: Distance to the visible horizon from the target's height.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
